RT @godofprompt: 🚨 BREAKING: the strongest crypto bull case just stopped being ideological and became purely infrastructural

billions of a…

🚨 BREAKING: Stanford just proved that every major AI model is systematically making you worse at relationships.

Researchers tested 11 state-of-the-art AI models, including GPT-5, GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, Llama, DeepSeek, and Qwen, across thousands of real advice scenarios. 

The https://t.co/yciIJPwK1I

This site literally has thousands of prompts for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, & Nano Banana. 

Explore for free 👇
https://t.co/fGYp0pIS60

🦞 最近被龙虾轰炸太多了？玩腻了？想卸载？
等一下！听说最近卸载小龙虾服务越来越火了，上门服务一次收费 500 块。
但卸载 OpenClaw 不是拖进废纸篓就完事，需要至少 5 个复杂步骤：停服务、清配置、删状态、处理多 profile...
我把这套流程打包好了，写成完全开源免费的工具 —— OpenClaw Killer https://t.co/OvE2RHTqnG

1.1 版本更新：
1. 支持16国语言
2. 支持卸载龙虾后脚本自卸载，确保干净无残留

1.2 版本更新，支持 OpenClaw Skill，可以让 OpenClaw 卸载自己了：

如果你还安装着 OpenClaw，可以将其作为 Skill 使用：

# 安装 Skill
./install-skill.sh

# 然后在 OpenClaw 中说
"卸载 OpenClaw" 或 "uninstall OpenClaw"
